tagline: A Living Archive for Your Table
description: Replace this text in Admin Mode. Introduce your world, your party, your campaign tone, and the reason your players should open this site between sessions.
statusBadge: Template Ready · Edit in Admin Mode
footerBranding: Powered by The Adventurer’s Campaign Codex

homeCards.title: Characters
homeCards.text: Player rooms, character sheets, inventory, combat tools, and custom 3D dice.

homeCards.title: Powers
homeCards.text: Gods, factions, patrons, guilds, empires, and the forces moving behind the screen.

homeCards.title: Atlas
homeCards.text: Maps for worlds, cities, regions, planes, dungeons, and private DM notes.

homeCards.title: Items
homeCards.text: Relics, treasure, artifacts, attunement notes, item art, and party loot.

homeCards.title: Story
homeCards.text: Session history, major arcs, turning points, consequences, and campaign records.

homeCards.title: Gallery
homeCards.text: Campaign art, battle maps, handouts, portraits, screenshots, and table memories.
